title: hydriastele microcarpa
intro: Hydriastele microcarpa, also known as the little palm, is a plant species native to Australia and New Guinea. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hydriastele microcarpa include treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, as well as acting as an antioxidant and antiseptic agent. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, the leaves are crushed and applied topically to the affected area.
